fields.summary: A mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` is a mutable, disposable object for constructing paths
command-by-command. After adding contours with methods such as `MoveTo`,
`LineTo`, `CubicTo`, and `AddRect`, call <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot>
to obtain an immutable `SKPath` snapshot, or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> to take ownership of the built path and
reset the builder in one step.

This type wraps a native Skia resource and implements `IDisposable`. Always
dispose of it when done, either with a `using` statement or by calling
`Dispose()` directly.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();

using var path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class as a copy of the specified path.

params.path: The path whose geometry is copied into this builder.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to this path.

params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.startAngle: The angle in degrees at which the arc starts.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees; positive sweeps clockwise.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a circle contour to this path.

params.dir: The direction in which to wind the circle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends an oval contour fitting the specified rectangle to this path.

params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from the specified path to this path using the given add mode.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from the specified path, transformed by the given matrix, to this path.

params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.matrix: The transformation applied to the appended contours.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from the specified path, translated by the given offset, to this path.

params.dy: The vertical translation applied to the appended contours.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.dx: The horizontal translation applied to the appended contours.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour from an array of points to this path.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to automatically close the contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour from a span of points to this path.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to automatically close the contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to this path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to this path, starting at the specified corner index.

params.startIndex: The zero-based index (0–3) of the corner at which to start the contour.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour to this path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour to this path, starting at the specified corner index.

params.startIndex: The zero-based starting corner index for the contour.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a closed rounded-rectangle contour with the specified corner radii to this path.

params.ry: The vertical radius of the rounded corners.
params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the rounded rectangle.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.
params.rx: The horizontal radius of the rounded corners.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to this path using two tangent points and a radius.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to this path.

params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.startAngle: The angle in degrees at which the arc starts.
params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to begin a new contour with a move-to; otherwise, <see langword="false" /> to append to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to this path using radii, rotation, size, sweep, and endpoint.

params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
params.r: The radii of the ellipse as (rx, ry).
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the sweep direction.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to this path using two tangent points specified as scalar coordinates and a radius.

params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to this path using scalar radii, rotation, size, sweep, and endpoint.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the sweep direction.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the arc endpoint.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the arc endpoint.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by appending a line from the current point to the last move-to point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a weighted quadratic Bézier (conic) segment to the current contour.

params.w: The conic weight controlling how closely the curve follows the control point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a weighted quadratic Bézier (conic) segment to the current contour using scalar coordinates.

params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier segment to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier segment to the current contour using scalar coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.summary: Finalizes the path and transfers ownership to the caller, resetting this builder.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing all contours built so far.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the resources used by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and unmanaged resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only unmanaged resources.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.summary: Releases the native Skia path builder resources held by this instance.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type that determines how overlapping contours are filled.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a straight-line segment from the current point to the specified point.

params.point: The endpoint of the line segment.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a straight-line segment from the current point to the specified coordinates.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified point.

params.point: The starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the starting point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the starting point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier segment to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier segment to the current contour using scalar coordinates.

params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style arc to this path using radii, rotation, size, sweep, and endpoint offset.

params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
params.r: The radii of the ellipse as (rx, ry).
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the sweep direction.
params.xy: The relative endpoint offset of the arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style arc to this path using scalar radii, rotation, size, sweep, and endpoint offset.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the sweep direction.
params.y: The relative y-offset of the arc endpoint.
params.x: The relative x-offset of the arc endpoint.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic segment to the current contour using relative point offsets.

params.point0: The relative control point offset from the current point.
params.point1: The relative endpoint offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic segment to the current contour using scalar relative offsets.

params.dy0: The relative y-offset of the control point.
params.dy1: The relative y-offset of the endpoint.
params.dx0: The relative x-offset of the control point.
params.dx1: The relative x-offset of the endpoint.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier segment to the current contour using relative point offsets.

params.point0: The relative first control point offset.
params.point1: The relative second control point offset.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier segment to the current contour using scalar relative offsets.

params.dx2: The relative x-offset of the endpoint.
params.dy2: The relative y-offset of the endpoint.
params.dx1: The relative x-offset of the second control point.
params.dx0: The relative x-offset of the first control point.
params.dy1: The relative y-offset of the second control point.
params.dy0: The relative y-offset of the first control point.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Removes all contours and resets this builder to an empty state.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from the specified path to this path in reverse order.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended in reverse.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment using a relative endpoint offset from the current point.

params.point: The relative offset of the endpoint.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment using scalar relative offsets from the current point.

params.dy: The relative y-offset of the endpoint.
params.dx: The relative x-offset of the endpoint.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at a point offset relative to the current point.

params.point: The relative offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at scalar offsets relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier segment to the current contour using relative point offsets.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier segment to the current contour using scalar relative offsets.

params.dy0: The relative y-offset of the control point.
params.dy1: The relative y-offset of the endpoint.
params.dx0: The relative x-offset of the control point.
params.dx1: The relative x-offset of the endpoint.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();

fields.summary: Creates an immutable snapshot of the path built so far without resetting this builder.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing all contours built so far.
